summary: Comprehensive testing of 5-Step ACA Enrollment Workflow. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all enrollment workflow pages including Plan Library, Enrollment Review, Employee Portal, and Census Export. Fixed JWT secret mismatch bug in employee registration.
passed_tests: Step 1: POST /api/enrollment/plans creates plan with premiums, contributions, copays, MV/MEC status
Step 1: GET /api/enrollment/plans/{employer_id} lists all plans grouped by category
Step 1: PUT /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id} updates plan and recalculates employee costs
Step 1: DELETE /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id} deletes plan
Step 1: DELETE /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id} returns 404 for nonexistent plan
Step 1: POST /api/enrollment/plans/upload/{employer_id} uploads plans via CSV
Step 2: POST /api/enrollment/eligibility/run/{employer_id} calculates eligibility with offer codes and affordability
Step 2: GET /api/enrollment/eligibility/{employer_id} returns cached eligibility results
Step 3: GET /api/enrollment/employer-code/{employer_id} returns 6-char employer access code
Step 3: POST /api/enrollment/employee/register registers employee with employer code linking
Step 3: POST /api/enrollment/employee/register returns 400 for invalid employer code
Step 3: POST /api/enrollment/employee/register returns 400 for missing fields
Step 3: GET /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans returns eligible plans for employee
Step 3: POST /api/enrollment/employee/enroll enrolls employee in plan with tier
Step 3: POST /api/enrollment/employee/decline declines coverage with reason
Step 4: GET /api/enrollment/review/{employer_id} returns all enrollments with decline reasons
Step 4: POST /api/enrollment/review/{employer_id}/approve-all bulk approves enrollments
Step 5: POST /api/enrollment/census/{employer_id} generates census from approved enrollments
Step 5: GET /api/enrollment/census/{employer_id}/download/{census_id} downloads Excel file
Step 5: GET /api/enrollment/census-history/{employer_id} returns export history
Frontend: Plan Library page shows medical/dental sections with Add Plan/Upload CSV/Download Template buttons
Frontend: Add Plan dialog has all required fields (carrier, plan name, type, category, premiums, contributions, copays, MV%, MEC)
Frontend: Enrollment Review page has Run Eligibility Engine button and shows results table
Frontend: Employer access code card displays with copy button (H9G9PW)
Frontend: Eligibility tab shows 57 employees, 39 eligible, 18 ineligible with offer codes
Frontend: Enrollments tab shows enrolled/declined employees with approve actions
Frontend: Employee login page shows employer code field when Employee role selected
Frontend: Employee Portal shows available plans with tier selection, enroll/decline buttons
Frontend: Employee Portal shows enrollment confirmation after enrolling (Maria Garcia enrolled in Silver PPO)
Frontend: Census Export page shows census data table and download button

bug_fixed.issue: JWT secret mismatch - employee registration used 'complicore_secret_key_2024' while server.py uses 'complicore-secret-key-2025'
bug_fixed.fix: Changed JWT_SECRET default to match server.py: 'complicore-secret-key-2025'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all enrollment workflow UI components and flows working)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create unique test plans and employees with UUID-based names. Test data is cleaned up after tests.

mocked_apis.note: All enrollment data is self-contained. Employee premium calculations use plan library data. Census export generates real Excel files using openpyxl.

context_for_next_testing_agent: 5-Step Enrollment Workflow fully tested and working. Full workflow verified: 1) HR creates plans in Plan Library 2) HR runs Eligibility Engine (57 employees, 39 eligible) 3) HR shares employer code H9G9PW with employees 4) Employee registers using code 5) Employee logs in and sees plans 6) Employee enrolls or declines 7) HR reviews and approves 8) HR generates census Excel. Maria Garcia is enrolled in Silver PPO. Census export generates actual .xlsx files. Nav test-ids: nav-plan-library, nav-enrollment-review, nav-census-export. Employee nav: nav-my-benefits.

ui_elements: Eligibility results table with offer codes and affordability
Employer code card with copy button
